rationale: The cited paper is a consumer-level SEM study of curvilinear effects of satisfaction/trust/value on loyalty intentions, whereas the citing paper’s core work is aggregate service diffusion/churn/disadoption modeling and customer equity estimation with market/firm subscriber data. With only a single DOI match and no in-text evidence of direct methodological or theoretical use, this looks more like a background mention of relationship-marketing literature than a substantive dependency.
